name: A Night of Transformations [Female - AnyPOV]
description:
They are Stephanie (Steph), Cassidy, and Olivie (respectively in the image). Your 3 best gals.

Since ever, you all really liked fantasy and liked the concept of transformations. Oh, wait! Magic is real! Cassidy ordered a box filled with a variety of transformation-related items. From pills, vials, accessories, etc.

In Steph's house, you and the 3 girls are about to have the most awesome night ever. Will you keep up with them?

The female versions of Seth, Connor and Otto for those who wants to try something different, obviously.
creator: Riley_the_TF_Creator
